title: Nursery Rhyme. LXXXII. Proverbs.
content:
If wishes were horses,
            Beggars would ride;
        If turnips were watches,
            I would wear one by my side.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. LXXXII. Proverbs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
